title: Coffee Mug,400ml Ceramics Coffee Cup,Stoneware Coffee Mugs,Tea Mugs,Porcelain Coffee Mug,Cappuccino Cups,Pumpkin Shape Cups for Office and Home, Gift and Present
features: Large capacity: 400ml, Classic simple retro ceramic coffee mug, beautiful and practical. Glazed by hand. Each cup is unique

The large coffee mug has an extra large handle that is comfortable to hold. The large cup is also particularly thick-walled and made of solid, high-quality ceramic, which can prevent burns on your hands.

The coffee mug is made of high quality ceramic, which is safe and environmentally friendly. The bottom is non-slip design. Thanks to the high-quality processing of our products, the colors do not fade and you can enjoy your ceramic tableware for longer

Perfect for milk, latte, cappuccino, coffee, tea, ice cream and hot chocolate. Suitable for hot and cold drinks. It can be placed in a microwave to heat milk, washed in a dishwasher, or sterilized in a sterilizer.

Whether it's coffee, tea or even a soup, this stoneware mug is just the thing for those who want more. Each mug has a unique color to brighten your life and decorate your home, kitchen and office. Best gift for Mother's Day, Valentine's Day, Father's Day, Wedding or Christmas.
description: If you are looking for a compact and robust coffee mug with a special design and large capacity. This glossy coffee mug is perfect for you! It is a great gift for friends, family and colleagues on birthdays, Christmas, Thanksgiving and other days. The coffee mug is easy to clean and perfect for everyday use.
